reviews.review_description: I’ve paid and downloaded the app, it shows the content but doesn’t play anything

developer_response.body: Hello my friend! Could you send me some screenshots or videos of the errors you're facing? So I'll be able to help you to fix it (davidkalil@outlook.com)

reviews.review_description: It's a good app there are things to improve but They could improve some things. In conclusion IT IS SAFE TO BUY

developer_response.body: Hello friend! Thank you for your feedback! I'd appreciate to receive your suggestions of what could be improved (davidkalil@outlook.com)

reviews.review_description: Not working and how do I change it to english?

developer_response.body:
Helloz what error message did you get? Send me by email and I can help you to solve (davidkalil@outlook.com)
To change to English language, you can click in the language flag in log in screen or you'll find the option into settings screen

reviews.review_title: Not working!! Please help with this.
reviews.review_description: I have added my playlist and is not playing at all.

developer_response.body: Hello, are you using any kind of VPN in your device or network ? It could cause some issues. If it's not the case, have you tried to activate a DNS option into the app settings? If you need more assistance I'll be glad to help (davidkalil@outlook.com)
